text:
Perfect Memory Studio 思い出写真館 - is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and so is required for a player to complete the game.
__NOTOC__

|align=center colspan="3"|Specify a time and date to get a picture of yourself in the past. You may also request a sequence of photographs.

Summary

Perfect Memory Studio 思い出写真館 - This card allows the caster to summon a Perfect Memory Studio. It allows the user to develop a picture of yourself as you would have appeared on the time and date you specified. This allows a user to compare themselves to their former selves. You may wish to do this for a variety or reasons. You will able to also request for a sequence of photographs.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.056 :: 思い出写真館 
年月日と時間を言えば、その時の自分の姿を写真にしてくれる写真館。連続撮影も可能。
|-
![Eng]
|No.056 :: Perfect Memory Studio 
Tell the time and date, and the photo studio will show you yourself at that time. Can be multiple photos.
|}
